---
title: "About"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

I'm a postdoctoral research fellow at the <a href="https://www.baycrest.org/Baycrest/Research-Innovation/About-Us/Rotman-Research-Institute" target="_blank">Rotman Research Institute</a>. Prior to that I was at the University of Missouri working on an ESRC funded project, Working memory across the adult life-span: An adversarial collaboration (<a href="http://womaac.psy.ed.ac.uk/" target="_blank">WoMAAC</a>).

<br></br>
<div style="text-align: center"><img src="files/skye.JPG" title="Old Man of Storr, Isle of Skye" width="400"></div>
<br></br>
